ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR(AND( ISPICKVAL( Problem_type__c,'User Reactivation'), ISBLANK( Username_to_Reactivate__c ) ) , AND(NOT( ISBLANK( Username_to_Reactivate__c )) , NOT(ISPICKVAL( Problem_type__c,'User Reactivation'))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_SUPPORT_002: IF 'problem type' is User Reactivation, ensure 'Username to reactivate' field is populated. For all other problem types, 'Username to reactivate' field must be left blank.
